title: Isolation of Autophagosomes and Proteinase K Protection Assay
author: Elisabeth Holzer

steps_raw.instruction: Use the following cell lines: HAP1 ATG9A-GFP (RRID:CVCL_E2TR) HAP1 ATG9A-GFP ATG2 DKO (RRID:CVCL_F0LE)
Seed cells in 15 cm dishes (two dishes per condition).
Treat cells with: Earle’s Balanced Salt Solution (EBSS). 100 nanomolar (nM) Bafilomycin A1 (BafA).
Incubate for 02:00:00 prior to harvesting.
Harvest cells by trypsinization and pellet via centrifugation.
Wash once with PBS.

Resuspend pellets in 800 µL Vesicle Isolation Buffer (VIB): A B 1 HEPES pH 7.5 20 mM 2 NaCl 150 mM 3 Sucrose 250 mM 4 1× cOmplete™ EDTA-free protease inhibitors (Roche) 5 β-glycerophosphate 20 mM 6 Sodium orthovanadate 1 mM 7 NaF 1 mM 8 EDTA pH 8.0 1 mM
Transfer to LoBind tubes (Eppendorf, Cat# 0030108116).
Lyse cells by passing suspension through a 26G needle 30×.
Chill lysates On ice for 00:10:00 .
Repeat needle passage another 30×.
Clear nuclei and debris:
Re-extract pellet:
Centrifuge at 1000 x g, °C, for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .
Collect supernatant.
Add 700 µL VIB to the pellet of the previous step, repeat 1000 x g, °C, spin.
Pool both supernatants.
Remove residual debris:
Centrifuge pooled supernatants at 2000 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 .
Collect supernatant.
Enrich autophagosomes:
Centrifuge supernatant at 10000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 at 4 °C .
Collect pellet.
Wash pellet with 500 µL Wash Buffer (WB): A B 1 HEPES pH 7.5 20 mM 2 NaCl 150 mM 3 1× cOmplete EDTA-free protease inhibitors
Re-pellet at 10000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 .
Resuspend final pellet in 500 µL WB + 1 mM DTT %s %s
Use this AP-enriched fraction for downstream applications.
Use 150 µL of AP suspension.
Add 10 μg/ml proteinase K (Thermo Scientific, Cat# EO0491).
Incubate for 00:20:00 at 4 °C .
Add 1 millimolar (mM) PMSF (Santa Cruz Biotechnology, Cat# sc-482875).
Incubate On ice for 00:10:00 .
Centrifuge at 10000 x g, °C, for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .
Resuspend pellet in 15 µL WB %s %s 6× SDS loading buffer
Analyze by SDS-PAGE and Western blotting.
